description: CompositionGrey and navy blue striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar with a front buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on print/embroideryCreated from cotton fabric, this striped shirt from genesis makes for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with jeans for an urban semi-formal style. Add on suede shoes, a blazer and classy accessories and enjoy the winter with much elan.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'11"; Shoulders: 17.5"
